1) **Restart/build status:** ✅ Manual gateway restart is complete. No new code changes were made in this restart, and the previously implemented Telegram image-intake update was already build-verified earlier (`npm run build` / `tsc` passed).

2) **What changed (high level):** This was a runtime/session refresh only. The active code still includes the recent Telegram inbound image support (photos + image documents) and image-aware routing/context handling.

3) **What should we verify next?** Please run **`/status`** in Telegram, then send an actual **photo** with caption **`test image`** so I can confirm end-to-end image intake after restart.
